title: Overtures to the Red
intro: A Red factor you once snubbed sends a careful letter. The Stock Sanctuary, it seems, would rather profit from Runehold than feud with it — if you will make the first gesture.

advisors.text: Enemies cost more than tribute. Swallow the pride, Archon. Red gold spends the same as any.

choices.label: Send a generous tribute to mend the breach

win.text: The gift is received with a counting-house smile. The feud cools to mere commerce.
win.saga: The Gilded Reach sought to mend an old feud, and you sent a generous tribute — the quarrel cooled to mere commerce.

choices.label: Offer Red factors trade rights in Runehold

win.text: Red stalls rise in your market square. Coin trickles in, and so does Red influence you cannot quite see.
win.saga: To mend the breach with Red, you granted its factors trade rights in Runehold — coin trickled in, and Red influence with it.

win.text: You burn the letter. The coven likes a leader who holds a grudge — until the price of one comes due.
win.saga: Red offered to mend your old feud, and you burned the letter and let it stand — a grudge the coven admired, until its price came due.
